checks.name: syntax_validation
checks.evidence: python3 -m py_compile src/api/geocoding/routes.py src/services/geocoding/service.py src/schemas/geocoding/__init__.py src/schemas/geocoding/models.py src/api/parcels/__init__.py

checks.name: api_contract_alignment
checks.evidence: GET /api/v1/parcels/geocode and POST /internal/v1/geocoding/metadata now enforce contract-compatible accuracy flags and provider failure handling remains 503-based.

checks.name: idempotency_behavior
checks.evidence: Internal metadata persistence now treats exact-key replay as success and rejects conflicting keys with 409 instead of silently overwriting metadata.

warnings.summary: The task manifest allows only src/api/geocoding/, src/services/geocoding/, and src/schemas/geocoding/, but PR #5 also required app-wiring/package-surface touches outside that scope.
Full dependency-based runtime verification is currently blocked by the pre-existing requirement fastapi>=0.135.0, which is not installable from the available package index in this environment.
